sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1609" key="a)ei/klautos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀείκλαυτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1609.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">filled with perpetual lamentation</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μέλαθρα</foreign> prob. in Hymn. ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2115.tlg001:4:36" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hippol.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Haer.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.36</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
